page_settings.seo_title: Water Heater Services — Installation & Repair | Regal Plumbing & Rooter
page_settings.seo_description: Tank, tankless, and heat pump water heater installation and repair in Ontario, CA and the Inland Empire. Call (909) 600-4561.

settings.editor: 24/7 Emergency Service Available — Call (909) 600-4561
Installation and repair of tank, tankless, and heat pump water heaters — all major brands serviced

No hot water is never convenient. Regal Plumbing & Rooter installs and repairs all types of water heaters — traditional tank units, tankless (on-demand) systems, and hybrid heat pump models. Whether your current unit needs a repair or it's time for an upgrade, our licensed technicians will assess your needs and provide the right solution for your home and budget.

• Traditional tank water heater installation and repair
  • Tankless (on-demand) water heater installation
  • Hybrid heat pump water heater systems
  • All major brands serviced
  • Anode rod replacement and tank flushing
  • Emergency water heater service available
Service, repair, and replacement of traditional 30-80 gallon tank water heaters. We carry units from all major brands and can install same-day in most cases.
Install or repair tankless water heaters that provide on-demand hot water and last significantly longer than tank units. Ideal for efficiency-focused homeowners.
Diagnose and fix water heater issues including pilot light failures, anode rod corrosion, sediment buildup, thermostat problems, and pressure relief valve issues.

settings.description_text: Upfront, transparent quotes before any work begins. No hidden fees, no surprises — even in emergencies.
24/7 availability for emergencies. We arrive quickly and work efficiently to minimize damage.
Every job backed by our commitment to premium craftsmanship and lasting results.
